content.title: Bun — Incredibly fast JavaScript runtime
content.snippet: Bun is an all-in-one toolkit for JavaScript and TypeScript apps.

content.title: GitHub - oven-sh/bun
content.snippet: Bun is a fast all-in-one JavaScript runtime.

results:
Bun is a JavaScript runtime written in Zig, designed as a drop-in replacement for Node.js. It provides a bundler, test runner, and package manager out of the box.

REMINDER: Sources may be outdated.
